heading: Allowance of deductions
label: 211 Allowance of deductions
text: In computing taxable income under section 63, there shall be allowed as deductions the items specified in this part, subject to the exceptions provided in part IX (section 261 and following, relating to items not deductible).
notes: Effective Date of 1977 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–30section 106(a) of Pub. L. 95–30section 1 of this titleDec. 31, 1976
